pattern: Same DP as Good Subsequence I but optimised to O(n*k): maintain per-value best and a global top-2 to handle different-value extensions in O(1) per (i,j).
hints: Define dp[i][j] = max good subsequence length ending at i with j transitions; the recurrence is the same as the smaller-n version.
For the 'same value' extension, track best_same[j][v] = max dp among previous indices with value v.
For the 'different value' extension, maintain the global top-2 dp values (with their associated nums values) so you can find the best predecessor with a different value in O(1).

edge_inputs.description: all same, k large, answer is n
k=1 allows exactly one value change

stress.description: moderate array with few distinct values and moderate k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(size, 500)
    vals = [rng.randint(1, 8) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(0, min(10, n))
    return [vals, k]
